name: compliance closed-loop step framework-catalog-to-control-mapping flows a framework into the controls.yaml file
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf 'frameworks: [nist-csf-2]\n' > compliance/active-frameworks.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step framework-to-mapping --frameworks compliance/active-frameworks.yaml --controls compliance/controls.yaml 2>err.txt && grep -q 'framework: nist-csf-2' compliance/controls.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
